calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of minor.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Cristina Paxton.
Petitioner: Yanping Liu, present in pro per, was sworn and examined with the help of an interpreter Charles Zhang.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Viva Wong to: VIVA LIU VOONG.
Decree signed in open court.
